name: Hungarian Spiced Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Green Onion; Chopped, Use All
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the cottage cheese in a colander to remove excess water.
2. Transfer the strained cottage cheese into a blender or food processor.
3. Add paprika, caraway seeds, capers, mustard, and green onion to the blender.
4. Blend all ingredients together until almost smooth.
5. Gradually add sour cream while blending.
6. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Chicken, String Beans, Cherry Tomatoes, Chili Peppers
